text_raw: Of all cursed days, it had to be today!
text_clean: Of all cursed days, it had to be today!

text_raw: I'm going to be late...
text_clean: I'm going to be late...

text_raw: I stepped down from the wagon for a moment's rest and ended up twisting my ankle.
text_clean: I stepped down from the wagon for a moment's rest and ended up twisting my ankle.

text_raw: Even the smallest movement sends pain shooting through my leg.
text_clean: Even the smallest movement sends pain shooting through my leg.

text_raw: I can't possibly take the reins like this, so I've been stranded here.
text_clean: I can't possibly take the reins like this, so I've been stranded here.

text_raw: I've an important trade scheduled today, so this is a real mess.
text_clean: I've an important trade scheduled today, so this is a real mess.

text_raw: Do you know how to drive a wagon?
text_clean: Do you know how to drive a wagon?

text_raw: Would you take the reins and get me to the trading post?
text_clean: Would you take the reins and get me to the trading post?

text_raw: I'm pleading with you, this trade's too important to lose.
text_clean: I'm pleading with you, this trade's too important to lose.

text_raw: You got us through the desert in one piece!
text_clean: You got us through the desert in one piece!

text_raw: Without today's trade, I'd have taken a huge loss.
text_clean: Without today's trade, I'd have taken a huge loss.

text_raw: The desert turns dangerous the moment you lower your guard...
text_clean: The desert turns dangerous the moment you lower your guard...

text_raw: The heat's bad enough, but it's the bandits you've really got to watch.
text_clean: The heat's bad enough, but it's the bandits you've really got to watch.

text_raw: I feared it was over for me, but you came to my aid.
text_clean: I feared it was over for me, but you came to my aid.

text_raw: I'm truly grateful for all you've done.
text_clean: I'm truly grateful for all you've done.

text_raw: You ought to be careful out here as well.
text_clean: You ought to be careful out here as well.

text_raw: Here, this is for you.
text_clean: Here, this is for you.

text_raw: Of all cursed days, it had to be today!
text_clean: Of all cursed days, it had to be today!

text_raw: I'm going to be late...
text_clean: I'm going to be late...

text_raw: Even the smallest movement sends pain shooting through my leg.

text_raw: I can't possibly take the reins like this, so I've been stranded here.
text_clean: I can't possibly take the reins like this, so I've been stranded here.

text_raw: I've an important trade scheduled today, so this is a real mess.
text_clean: I've an important trade scheduled today, so this is a real mess.

text_raw: Do you know how to drive a wagon?
text_clean: Do you know how to drive a wagon?

text_raw: Would you take the reins and get me to the trading post?
text_clean: Would you take the reins and get me to the trading post?

text_raw: I'm pleading with you, this trade's too important to lose.
text_clean: I'm pleading with you, this trade's too important to lose.

text_raw: It's this way!
text_clean: It's this way!

text_raw: It's not safe to wander the desert alone!
text_clean: It's not safe to wander the desert alone!

text_raw: You really did save my day, thanks.
text_clean: You really did save my day, thanks.

text_raw: Everything's going so well today... seems like luck is on my side.
text_clean: Everything's going so well today... seems like luck is on my side.

text_raw: You look like you've been on the road a fair while...
text_clean: You look like you've been on the road a fair while...

text_raw: might you be interested in a few tales of the desert?
text_clean: might you be interested in a few tales of the desert?

text_raw: I'm quite the storyteller.
text_clean: I'm quite the storyteller.

text_raw: Spare me a moment, would you?
text_clean: Spare me a moment, would you?

text_raw: Guild rules say no one travels to the desert alone. It's a death trap out there.
text_clean: Guild rules say no one travels to the desert alone. It's a death trap out there.

text_raw: I've a load of goods to hurry to the trade post, but there's no one free to help.
text_clean: I've a load of goods to hurry to the trade post, but there's no one free to help.

text_raw:
I wouldn't ask this of just anyone,
its only that I saw you handle a bandit horde all by yourself the other day.
text_clean:
I wouldn't ask this of just anyone,
its only that I saw you handle a bandit horde all by yourself the other day.

text_raw: And I could really use your help on the road today. I'm not asking for charity.
text_clean: And I could really use your help on the road today. I'm not asking for charity.

text_raw: I'll... I'll even pay you for your trouble.
text_clean: I'll... I'll even pay you for your trouble.

text_raw: We're lucky the wind is calm today. Once a sandstorm hits, you can't see a thing.
text_clean: We're lucky the wind is calm today. Once a sandstorm hits, you can't see a thing.

text_raw:
The desert will burn you in the sun and freeze you under the stars.
It's best to always carry water and a blanket.
text_clean:
The desert will burn you in the sun and freeze you under the stars.
It's best to always carry water and a blanket.

text_raw:
Back in the day, we faced those extremes on camel,
but now we've got wagons to carry greater loads.
text_clean:
Back in the day, we faced those extremes on camel,
but now we've got wagons to carry greater loads.

text_raw: Well of course, there are other dangers, snakes and scorpions still spring from the sand.
text_clean: Well of course, there are other dangers, snakes and scorpions still spring from the sand.

text_raw: I heard a rumor last month of a merchant guild lost in the eastern hills.
text_clean: I heard a rumor last month of a merchant guild lost in the eastern hills.

text_raw:
That's why knowing how to follow tracks is vital,
but if there's a sandstorm, then there's no hope.
text_clean:
That's why knowing how to follow tracks is vital,
but if there's a sandstorm, then there's no hope.

text_raw: The daily market at the trading post is full of haggling—quite the spectacle.
text_clean: The daily market at the trading post is full of haggling—quite the spectacle.

text_raw: It's nice to have some quiet company before a busy day.
text_clean: It's nice to have some quiet company before a busy day.

text_raw: The desert may seem calm, but it can turn on you in an instant.
text_clean: The desert may seem calm, but it can turn on you in an instant.

text_raw: Stop too long on the sand and your wagon will be bogged down, it's best to keep moving.
text_clean: Stop too long on the sand and your wagon will be bogged down, it's best to keep moving.

text_raw:
But if you happen to come across some shade it's a sign to rest,
worth more than water out here.
text_clean:
But if you happen to come across some shade it's a sign to rest,
worth more than water out here.

text_raw: And if you find ruins, they can be a good spot to rest, places once full of life.
text_clean: And if you find ruins, they can be a good spot to rest, places once full of life.

text_raw: Generations have depended on this road for trade, and it's still busy.
text_clean: Generations have depended on this road for trade, and it's still busy.

text_raw: Make sure to keep your eyes on fresh tracks, could be trouble nearby.
text_clean: Make sure to keep your eyes on fresh tracks, could be trouble nearby.

text_raw: And if the road fails you, the night sky will steer you if you know how to read it.
text_clean: And if the road fails you, the night sky will steer you if you know how to read it.

text_raw:
Just as the stars can guide you, the behaviour of beasts can warn you.
If they're hiding, you'd best follow suit.
text_clean:
Just as the stars can guide you, the behaviour of beasts can warn you.
If they're hiding, you'd best follow suit.

text_raw: Earning your keep out here is all about survival.
text_clean: Earning your keep out here is all about survival.

text_raw: I'm sure we'll sleep well tonight after this trek.
text_clean: I'm sure we'll sleep well tonight after this trek.

text_raw: Safely here, thanks to your marvellous talents.
text_clean: Safely here, thanks to your marvellous talents.

text_raw: I'd hire you as my personal escort if I could.
text_clean: I'd hire you as my personal escort if I could.

text_raw: I'll gladly give you future work if I'm able.
text_clean: I'll gladly give you future work if I'm able.

text_raw: I can't head out alone...
text_clean: I can't head out alone...

text_raw: If only someone could help me...
text_clean: If only someone could help me...

text_raw: So, what do you say?
text_clean: So, what do you say?
